_patch_meta.description: Re-evaluation of jealousy G3863 parazēloō (mti_term_id 939) — no changes recommended. All 4 verses (Rom 10:19, Rom 11:11, Rom 11:14, 1Cor 10:22) and 2 active groups confirmed correct under v3_5: 939-001 (provocation of human jealousy as divine redemptive instrument; anchors Rom 11:11 and Rom 11:14; related Rom 10:19); 939-002 (provocation of divine jealousy when his people turn to idols; anchor 1Cor 10:22). Both group descriptions read as characteristic-perspective per §6.2 Step 3; anchor distribution satisfies R4. SUPERSEDES PATCH-20260424-096-VCREVISE-V1 (cosmetic notes-stamp pattern, deprecated by §7.9.3b).
